recommendations.title: The Little Princess
recommendations.overview: A little girl goes in search of her father who is reported missing by the military during the Second Boer War.

recommendations.title: There's No Business Like Show Business
recommendations.overview: Molly and Terry Donahue, plus their three children, are The Five Donahues. Youngest son Tim meets hat-check girl Vicky and the family act begins to fall apart.

recommendations.title: The King and I
recommendations.overview: Widowed Welsh mother Anna Leonowens becomes a governess and English tutor to the wives and many children of the stubborn King Mongkut of Siam. Anna and the King have a clash of personalities as she works to teach the royal family about the English la

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth 2
recommendations.overview: With college decisions looming, Elle juggles her long-distance romance with Noah, changing relationship with bestie Lee and feelings for a new classmate.

recommendations.title: 42nd Street
recommendations.overview: A producer puts on what may be his last Broadway show, and at the last moment a chorus girl has to replace the star.

recommendations.title: The Computer Wore Tennis Shoes
recommendations.overview: Some college students manage to persuade the town's big businessman, A. J. Arno, to donate a computer to their college. When the problem- student, Dexter Riley, tries to fix the computer, he gets an electric shock and his brain turns to a computer; n

recommendations.title: Girls Trip
recommendations.overview: Four girlfriends take a trip to New Orleans for an annual festival and, along the way, rediscover their wild sides and strengthen the bonds of sisterhood.

recommendations.title: Bud Abbott and Lou Costello Meet Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: The Wolf Man tries to warn a dimwitted porter that Dracula wants his brain for Frankenstein monster's body.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: A Moment to Remember
recommendations.overview: A young couple's love is tested when Sun-jin is diagnosed with a rare form of Alzheimer's disease.
